title: tephrosia aurantiaca subsp. lutea
intro: Tephrosia aurantiaca subsp. lutea, also known as the yellow or golden horsefly tree, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia aurantiaca subsp. lutea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also being used to boost the immune system. Tephrosia aurantiaca subsp. lutea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
